title: Demo script + scripted walkthrough

NEW docs/plans/2026-04-19-team-x-phase-5-retrospective.md (271 lines) authored per M35 plan doc §4.5 locked 6-section structure. Cross-link added from design doc §13 Decisions Log. 0 tests. Unit baseline 1162 preserved. Atomic + ledger commit cadence held. M35-T3 shipped 2026-04-19 (commit 51393f8 — audit view chips for Phase 5 events; +28 unit → 1162). M35-T2 shipped 2026-04-19 (commit 1108247 — cross-milestone integration E2E). M35-T1 shipped 2026-04-19 (commit b68d09b — performance defaults + clamp audit; all 10 defaults HELD on llama3.1:8b evidence). M35-T0 shipped 2026-04-19 (commit da4ce1f — plan doc).
goal: Author the Phase 5 demo script + scenario library. NEW docs/demo/phase-5-walkthrough.md that the Phase 5 demo video would follow. NEW docs/demo/scenarios/ directory with 5 scenario stubs: (1) Hire a CEO, chat with it, watch it think (Phase 1 callback); (2) File a ticket → agent picks it up, uses MCP, closes it (Phase 2 callback); (3) One-click all-hands → minutes → action items → tickets (Phase 3 callback); (4) Ask Cmd+K 'why is the frontend team behind?' → get grounded multi-paragraph answer citing tickets (Phase 5 M30+M31 headline); (5) 'Decompose the Q1 roadmap into tickets' → write-side gate → decompose + delegate → copilot surfaces insight about the new workload (Phase 5 M32+M33+M34 headline). Zero code changes, zero tests. Pure documentation deliverable scoping the scripted walkthrough for future video recording or customer demo coordination.
acceptance: NEW docs/demo/phase-5-walkthrough.md authored. Overall walkthrough narrative connecting the five scenarios into one coherent 10–15 minute demo arc: starts with an empty Strategia-X company, ends with the copilot surfacing an insight about the workload the user just created. Opens with a 2-line hook ('Team-X is an AI-agent company that runs on your laptop. Here's what that looks like.') and closes with a forward-looking pointer to Phase 6 candidates.

NEW docs/demo/scenarios/01-hire-a-ceo.md — Phase 1 callback. 3-minute scenario: open hire dialog, pick CEO role, assign to Strategia-X, watch streaming reply in the chat drawer. Data attributes to target: data-testid='hire-dialog-trigger', data-role-id='ceo'. Key moments to narrate (token.delta streaming, thread persistence).

NEW docs/demo/scenarios/02-ticket-lifecycle.md — Phase 2 callback. 3-minute scenario: file a ticket assigned to the senior engineer, watch agent process it with an MCP call, close the ticket from the detail panel. Data attributes: data-testid='create-ticket', data-ticket-id. Key moments (MCP tool call surfaces in chip / audit log).

NEW docs/demo/scenarios/03-one-click-all-hands.md — Phase 3 callback. 2-minute scenario: call a meeting with all employees, Rocky interjects, end meeting, minutes render, action items become tickets. Data attributes: data-testid='call-meeting'. Key moments (orchestrator pause observable via status indicator).

NEW docs/demo/scenarios/04-ask-copilot-grounded-answer.md — Phase 5 M30+M31 headline. 3-minute scenario: Cmd+K → 'why is the frontend team behind?' → classifier routes complex_request → agentic loop runs → step-log mode shows plan → query_employees → query_tickets → answer card with citations. Data attributes: data-step-kind (plan/tool_call/tool_result/answer). Key moments (step card cycling, tool result cards, grounded answer with ticket IDs).

NEW docs/demo/scenarios/05-decompose-and-surface.md — Phase 5 M32+M33+M34 headline. 4-minute scenario: Cmd+K → 'decompose the Q1 roadmap into tickets' → amber write-side gate → Confirm → loop runs → decompose_project + delegate_subtask fire → tickets land on kanban → copilot sidebar opens via Cmd+Shift+K → new insight surfaces ('new workload created, 8 tickets assigned, watch review queue') → user dismisses → copilot.dismissed event hits audit log. Data attributes: data-step-kind, data-copilot-insight-id, data-copilot-sidebar-root. Key moments (amber gate distinguishable from red destructive gate, step card variants firing, copilot picks up real-time).

Each scenario doc includes: one-line hook / setup preconditions / scripted sequence (numbered steps with exact UI targets) / key moments to highlight on camera / expected duration / dependencies (which Phase the scenario exercises). Matches the executive, direct, data-backed tone of Rocky's existing user-guide docs.
docs/demo/ is a NEW directory — verify git tracks it. If needed, add a .gitkeep or ensure at least one file per subdirectory.
Zero code changes, zero IPC, zero bus events, zero migrations, zero tests. Pure markdown deliverables.

Architectural seams to reference in scenario docs: canned test-seam quartet (not directly demoable but explains why scenarios work repeatably against real providers), {rows, truncated} envelope (visible in tool_result step cards), data-step-kind + data-copilot-* stable selectors (will appear as DOM testids in recorded walkthroughs if narrator opens devtools), pause-aware providerRouter wrapper (scenario 3 demonstrates this via meeting pause), AbortController stop (Cmd+K step log has a stop button — scenario 4 could demonstrate), is_system filter-sweep (Copilot Conversations section in chat drawer is the visible surface).
